overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a video game (Watch Dogs: Legion) showing a character walking along London's South Bank at night. The character approaches and passes the illuminated London Eye ferris wheel, then continues through a wet, neon-lit market area with reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside promenade with illuminated ferris wheel ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet riverside promenade toward the illuminated London Eye

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in neon purple jacket walking along the river

entered.detail: large illuminated ferris wheel with red neon lighting and white central hub
historic stone building facade illuminated with blue uplighting
ornate black lampposts with warm white lights along the riverfront
overhead string lights spanning across the riverside walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wet South Bank promenade at night, approaching the illuminated London Eye. The blue-lit County Hall building stands on the right while string lights and lampposts line the river to the left. The pavement reflects the colorful lights, and a pedestrian in a neon jacket walks ahead on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: ferris wheel base with ticket booths and digital signage

events.description: arriving at the base of the London Eye with ticket kiosks becoming visible
character navigates around the ticket booth area, slightly adjusting path

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza at the base of the London Eye, passing ticket booths and digital displays

entered.detail: small illuminated buildings with digital displays selling ferris wheel tickets
tall vertical digital billboards displaying colorful advertisements
small kiosks with warm lighting selling food and drinks

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the base of the London Eye, walking beneath its massive red-lit structure. Ticket booths and digital advertising screens line the path. The County Hall building recedes from view as the character moves deeper into the plaza area, passing food vendor stalls on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market street with wooden food stalls

events.description: entering the covered market area with wooden stalls and restaurants

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow market street lined with wooden stalls and restaurants

notable_agents.action: person standing at food stall counter browsing menu

entered.detail: rustic wooden food stalls with warm interior lighting and menu boards
restaurant with illuminated signage and warm yellow lighting
overhead wooden roof structure covering the pedestrian street
tall contemporary skyscraper visible in the background between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow covered market street lined with wooden food stalls and restaurants. 'Little Frankie's' restaurant is visible on the left with warm lighting. The London Eye disappears from view as the character moves deeper into the market area, passing under wooden canopy structures with modern skyscrapers visible in the distant background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along London's South Bank at night, transitioning from an open riverfront promenade into a dense, neon-lit market street. It begins with the character walking past the blue-lit County Hall and reflective pavements, moving toward the glowing silhouette of the London Eye. As the character reaches the base of the ferris wheel, the scene shifts beneath the massive red-lit structure and past digital advertising screens and food stalls. The environment then narrows as the camera leaves the open plaza and enters a covered market street, passing the warm lights of Little Frankie's restaurant. Finally, the London Eye disappears from view as the character moves deeper under wooden canopies, with modern skyscrapers looming in the distant background.
